TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bob Allen hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, p'agal tins' tay suruw, pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1946, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 7, Bob Allen, squliq na p'unro. Bob Allen sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Bob Allen hiya ga magal blaq balay hopa pqwasan biru. kawas tay 1969,Bob Allen maki Minnesota Carleton pcbaq sato. kawas tay 1975,hiya ga mqwas biru maki Harvard hopa pqwasan biru. kawas tay 1973,Bob Allen t'aring praw sinisy maki Hamilton hopa pqwasan biru.kawas tay 1975,maki British Columbia rmaw pcbaq lelaqi mzuy mari tara. kawas tay 2000,mtzyaw beh Oxford hopa pqwasan biru rmaw pcbaq lelaqi mzuy mari tara. kawas tay 2002,maki Nuffield pqwasan biru rmaw pcbaq lelaqi mzuy mari tara. kawas tay 2013,Bob Allen maki Oxford hopa pqwasan biru wal mhngaw ru ini pcizyaw la. kawas tay 1992-2003,Bob Allen mlokah balay mtzyaw magal wagiq ru blaq balay qbway. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Bob Allen Robert J. Allen)
S.PHON: βoβ allen ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw, pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βoβ allen, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. βoβ allen s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) βoβ allen ħija ɣa maɣal βlaq βalaj ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****,βoβ allen maki minnes~ɕota ʦ~ʨarleton pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕato. kawas~ɕ taj ****,ħija ɣa mqwas~ɕ βiru maki ħar*ar* ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****,βoβ allen tʔariŋ praw s~ɕinis~ɕj maki ħamilton ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru.kawas~ɕ taj ****,maki βritis~ɕħ ʦ~ʨolumβia rmaw pʦ~ʨβaq lelaqi mzuj mari tara. kawas~ɕ taj ****,mtzjaw βeħ ox*or* ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru rmaw pʦ~ʨβaq lelaqi mzuj mari tara. kawas~ɕ taj ****,maki nu**iel* pqwas~ɕan βiru rmaw pʦ~ʨβaq lelaqi mzuj mari tara. kawas~ɕ taj ****,βoβ allen maki ox*or* ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru wal mħŋaw ru ini pʦ~ʨizjaw la. kawas~ɕ taj ****-****,βoβ allen mlokaħ βalaj mtzjaw maɣal waɣiq ru βlaq βalaj qβwaj. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ βoβ allen roβert *. allen)
S.FORM: Bob Allen hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, p'agal tins' tay suruw, pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1946, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 7, Bob Allen, squliq na p'unro. Bob Allen sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Bob Allen hiya ga magal blaq balay hopa pqwasan biru. kawas tay 1969,Bob Allen maki Minnesota Carleton pcbaq sato. kawas tay 1975,hiya ga mqwas biru maki Harvard hopa pqwasan biru. kawas tay 1973,Bob Allen t'aring praw sinisy maki Hamilton hopa pqwasan biru.kawas tay 1975,maki British Columbia rmaw pcbaq lelaqi mzuy mari tara. kawas tay 2000,mtzyaw beh Oxford hopa pqwasan biru rmaw pcbaq lelaqi mzuy mari tara. kawas tay 2002,maki Nuffield pqwasan biru rmaw pcbaq lelaqi mzuy mari tara. kawas tay 2013,Bob Allen maki Oxford hopa pqwasan biru wal mhngaw ru ini pcizyaw la. kawas tay 1992-2003,Bob Allen mlokah balay mtzyaw magal wagiq ru blaq balay qbway. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players Bob Allen Robert J. Allen)
S.PHON: βoβ allen ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw, pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βoβ allen, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. βoβ allen s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) βoβ allen ħija ɣa maɣal βlaq βalaj ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****,βoβ allen maki minnes~ɕota ʦ~ʨarleton pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕato. kawas~ɕ taj ****,ħija ɣa mqwas~ɕ βiru maki ħar*ar* ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****,βoβ allen tʔariŋ praw s~ɕinis~ɕj maki ħamilton ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru.kawas~ɕ taj ****,maki βritis~ɕħ ʦ~ʨolumβia rmaw pʦ~ʨβaq lelaqi mzuj mari tara. kawas~ɕ taj ****,mtzjaw βeħ ox*or* ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru rmaw pʦ~ʨβaq lelaqi mzuj mari tara. kawas~ɕ taj ****,maki nu**iel* pqwas~ɕan βiru rmaw pʦ~ʨβaq lelaqi mzuj mari tara. kawas~ɕ taj ****,βoβ allen maki ox*or* ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru wal mħŋaw ru ini pʦ~ʨizjaw la. kawas~ɕ taj ****-****,βoβ allen mlokaħ βalaj mtzjaw maɣal waɣiq ru βlaq βalaj qβwaj. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ βoβ allen roβert *. allen)
